response.text:
REJECT

rationale: My policy requires share_min_soc_frac=0.5 (50% threshold) before accepting outbound offers, and r0c4's rationale indicates they're operating at 30% SoC—below my conservative threshold—making this offer unreliable given my belief that peers in low-SoC states cannot sustain commitments.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Neighbors are in survival mode and will not share below their own thresholds; I must focus on accepting inbound offers and rationing my own reserves until SoC exceeds 50%..
